testcase.name: testSubtract_2Feet_Minus1Foot_Returns1Foot

testcase.name: testGetErrorHistory_AfterErrorOperation_ReturnsError
testcase.system-out: 11:13:15.593 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 11:13:15.594 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Add failed: add Error: Cannot perform arithmetic between different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit 11:13:15.629 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/errored

testcase.name: testCompare_NotEqualQuantities_ReturnsFalse
testcase.system-out: 11:13:15.736 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:15.742 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=10.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> false

testcase.name: testCompare_EqualQuantities_ReturnsTrue
testcase.system-out: 11:13:15.797 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:15.801 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true

testcase.name: testGetHistoryByOperation_AfterCompare_ReturnsRecord
testcase.system-out: 11:13:15.888 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:15.891 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 11:13:15.907 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/operation/compare

testcase.name: testCompare_DifferentTypes_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 11:13:15.982 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:15.983 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Compare failed: compare Error: Cannot compare different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit

testcase.name: testDivide_2Feet_By1Foot_Returns2
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.033 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-9] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /divide called 11:13:16.037 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-9] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- divide: QuantityDTO(value=2.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) / QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0

testcase.name: testConvert_KilogramToGram_Returns1000
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.082 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /convert called 11:13:16.089 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- convert: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=KILOGRAM, measurementType=WeightUnit) -> GRAM = 1000.0

testcase.name: testAdd_DifferentTypes_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.142 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 11:13:16.142 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Add failed: add Error: Cannot perform arithmetic between different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit

testcase.name: testGetHistoryByType_LengthUnit_ReturnsAllLengthRecords
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.204 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:16.209 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 11:13:16.237 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 11:13:16.242 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- add: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) + QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0 11:13:16.259 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/type/LengthUnit

testcase.name: testConvert_FeetToInches_Returns12
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.484 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /convert called 11:13:16.490 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- convert: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> INCH = 12.0

testcase.name: testAdd_FeetAndInches_Returns2Feet
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.531 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 11:13:16.535 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- add: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) + QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0

testcase.name: testDivide_ByZero_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.609 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /divide called 11:13:16.610 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Divide unexpected error: Division by zero

testcase.name: testGetOperationCount_AfterMultipleCompares
testcase.system-out: 11:13:16.732 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:16.737 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 11:13:16.764 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 11:13:16.767 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=2.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=24.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 11:13:16.782 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /count/compare
